feed.title: SAP Community - SAP ERP
feed.subtitle: SAP ERP Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Supported SAP ECC Edge Services for Azure?
entry.content:
Hello - we are migrating our on-premise SAP ECC 6 system from an on-premise data center to MS Azure.  Are there any supported edge solutions to reduce latency for users that are geographically near the original on-premise data center?

Like an Azure Stack Edge, or the like?

entry.title: Extract Customer Master record from SAP ECC
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

Is there a method to retrieve the customer ID using either the customer's telephone number or their name in ECC?

entry.title: Questions about locked/expired users
entry.content:
Hello everyone!
I am a beginner in SAP and I would like to ask you three questions:
1 - Can an SAP user with an expired account due to a defined user validity account (GLTGB) log on to the system?
2 - Is there any note from SAP about good practices to lock users even if there is an previous validity date on the account?
3 - Is there any SAP manual that mentions the validity of users and the impossibility of accessing the system with an expired account?

entry.title: Reason for mouvement not showing in MIGO Good Issue
entry.content:
Dear SAP Expert, 

I have a business requirement to make the reason for mouvement mandatory for Good issue (201) in Migo

1- SAP Customizing Implementation Guide -> Materials Management -> Inventory Management and Physical Inventory -> Movement Types -> Record Reason for Goods Movements  : I Mantianed the mouvement reasons and made the reason control  mandatory but the reason is not showing  (I made the same config for Mvt 122 , and 161 and it's working fine just the 201 is not working)

entry.title: Create new data provider for Funds Management Reconciliation
entry.content:
I'm building a Reconciliation Rule (FMFGRCN_DEF_RULE) for Funds Management. 

However, the listed providers for Data Slices do not have Profit Centre as a field for data selection.

Is it possible to add a field in a existing data provider? If not, how do I create a new data provider?

entry.title: gross weight scale VK11
entry.content:
Dear all, 

I need to set up a price scale based on gross weight in VK11. Imagine that we need to set the shipping fees for sending product by DHL so:

1 KG --> 20 EUR

1,5 KG --> 22 EUR

2 KG --> 24 EUR

And so on.

I'd appreciate any idea or solution. Because I tried but it doesn't work.

Thanks 

Angie C

entry.title: how to assign the FICO Form in the place of standard form
entry.content:
how to assign customised sapscript form in the place of standard one for cash journal in FICO.... can anybody give me the exact solution I tried to assigned it in ob96 and then fbcjc3 but the output in fbcj is standard form only....

can anybody give me the solution for this problem

entry.title: Change revision name of the current revision level for a material
entry.content:
Hi all, do you know if it is possible to change the revision name of the current revision level of a material without changing the revision level itself?  

Thanks,

Diego

entry.title: Customer consignment invoice
entry.content:
Hi

I would like to know if it's possible  to send products to a customer consignment, and then invoice them without mentioning a batch. Which type of order can I use it ?

Thank you

entry.title: EHS OCC settings are grouped differently in Prod and Pre-Prod systems
entry.content:
Hi guys,

We are using EHS OCC to upload regulatory data in several systems (Quality, Pre-prod and Prod) and we are defining a default filter for which data to upload. but the data tree is not shown and grouped same in different systems which makes it difficult to insure same data is uploaded in each system (see below example for product safety data), knowing that the OCC version is the exactly the same in both systems (SP61 and all software components are the same as well).  

Is there anyone of you who has this experience or know if there is any parameter that influence this grouping.

entry.title: Documentation help - CATA and how it posts time/labour costs to a project?
entry.content:
Business requires documentation on CATA and how it posts time/labour costs to a project


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Searching work orders
entry.content:
Hi,

 

I'm trying to search for all the work orders under a level 1 or level 2 FLOC structure. I want to see all the WOs on all equipment under these levels. 

I have tried searching via IW39 filtering eg. level 1 FLOC but it's only showing a handful of error WOs tied to that level 1 FLOC and no other WO on equipment under it. 

Any ideas?

entry.title: SAP Mill Products - problem with material overhead rate
entry.content:
Hello Community,
we try to use the SAP Mill Product solution for using combined orders. We now got a problem with the period ending with the overhead surcharge. According to the SAP description we control the overhead surcharging on level of the combined orders and also settle the material overhead with the settlement rule on to the original orders. But with the period end closing the original orders receive the overhead again. The control buttons in transaction CO43 shows no possibility to not select this original orders.

Is anyone familiar with this problem?

Br
Carsten

entry.title: I want to export or save an invoice as an xml file.
entry.content:
Hi All, 

i want to save / export an invoice as an xml file.

I tried it via output management and store the file in the archive System with data type xml. But it is still show in PDF. 

i also try to use EDOC_COCKPIT (eDocument). All customizings are done. But no edocument is created, when i create a invoice via FV01. I also not sure, if i need there a licence for that. 

It is my first time to be here in the community. 

It would be pleasure, if someone could have any nice Inputs here. 

Thanks a lot. 

 

Regarding Stefan

entry.title: How to use MAN_CALL to send other document than MSDS
entry.content:
Hello there,

We want to use Man-Call function to ship a document which is not an SDS document (in fact it is Certified Product Data Sheet for Canada), but when doing this we are having (of course) same email content as for SDS when it is sent to customers as we are using same report category (MSDS) and same business process (MSDS_DIST).

Is there a simple way to send this document through CVD1 / Man-Call with a different email content than for MSDS(s)? Does this need Abap development?
Thanks a lot for your help

Daman

entry.title: (SAP BEST practice) Cutover process : Activating batch for material
entry.content:
Hi Team 

We are activating batch for material . 

Will like to know the cutover plan suggested by SAP for the same.
Will also like to know how to handle pending invoices ?

entry.title: Fund Budget check to disable for particular GL account in ECC Funds Management
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

could you please help on this 
I don't want to have a budget check on a GL for now, later i want to have budget check on the same GL?

is it possible in FM?

 

Regards,

Johnny

entry.title: Which SAP CAL appliance is best suited for installing SAP ECC system in AWS cloud?
entry.content:
Greetings, community

My goal is to launch and use a SAP ECC 6.0 system on the AWS cloud.

I wanted to know if SAP Cloud Appliance Library (SAP CAL) could be used for that. If so, please advise which appliance template I should use to do the same thing.

Please advise which SAP licenses I should get as well.

I want to perform test and demo using such SAP ECC 6.0 system.

Regards.

entry.title: Infotype 0008: Can I block specific fields for enter information that are related to infotype 0007?
entry.content:
Hi experts,

Is it possible to block fields in infotype 0008 to enter information? We experience different information regarding work time between IT0008 and IT0007. People ignore the hint when updating information in IT0007 that the information needs to be changed in IT0008 as well.

Is it either possible to display the information from IT0007 in the view of IT0008 and prevent changes her? Or is there any other good solution? Thank you very much for your support.

Best regards,

Ulrike

entry.title: SAP on Oracle RAC
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support,

we want to implement an SAP system on Oracle RAC with ASM on standard VMs, we have two questions.
1)In SAP note DIGITS it is reported that the Oracle RDBMS Home must be a shared file system. In our opinion this leads several limitations, including for example the impossibility of performing DB rolling Upgrades and Patches. 

Is this limitation still valid or we can implement local Oracle RDBMS Home for each node of the Oracle RAC Cluster? We are asking you because the SAP note DIGITS is not updated since DIGITS.

For "Oracle Engineered Systems" solutions this limitation does not seem to apply.

Is there any way to perform patches in rolling mode for the RDBMS Home on Oracle RAC for SAP?

2)In a RAC implementation the grid infrastructure software should be installed manually following Oracle Guides or using SAP tools or scripts provided by SAP? 

Thank you and best regards


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.
